attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SMXSS.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
NCPT.PARTNER_PARTY_KEY AS  PARTNER_PTY_KEY,
COALESCE(NCPCT.PARTNER_COUNTRY_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS PARTNER_COUNTRY_PARTY_KEY ,
COALESCE(NCPCT.DD_PGTMV_BE_GEO_ID_INT,-999) AS  SRC_RPTDRBK_PGTMV_BE_GEOID_INT,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)   EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
USER  EDW_CREATE_USER ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)   EDW_UPDATE_DTM ,
USER EDW_UPDATE_USER,
'I'	 ACTION_CODE,
'I'	  DML_TYPE,
SOMN.PGTMV_PARTNER_CERT_LEVEL AS PARTNER_CERTIFICATION_CD

 , PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE_SS_CODE AS PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE_SS_CODE 
 , PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE AS PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE 
 , PARTNER_OVERRIDE_REASON_CODE AS PARTNER_OVERRIDE_REASON_CODE FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_OTM_TRX_PARTIES_EXT_MNL_XAAS SOMN
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_OTM_MANUAL_TRX_XAAS  OMTX
ON SOMN.ORDER_LINE_ID=OMTX.ORDER_LINE_ID
AND SOMN.TRX_ORIG_CODE=OMTX.TRX_ORIG_CODE
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.SM_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITMSLSTRX_NRT  SMXSS
ON OMTX.SOURCE_TRX_ID=SMXSS.SK_TRX_ID_INT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER  NCPT 
ON SOMN.PGTMV_PARTY_BE_ID = NCPT.BK_PGTMV_PARTNER_ID_INT
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHNL_PTNR_COUNTRY NCPCT
ON NCPCT.PGTMV_PARTNER_COUNTRY_ID_INT  =  SOMN.PGTMV_PARTY_COUNTRY_ID
AND NCPCT.PARTNER_PARTY_KEY = NCPT.PARTNER_PARTY_KEY
WHERE SOMN.ENRICHMENT_CODE = 'PARTNER'

SELECT
SOMN.TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID
,SOMN.ORDER_LINE_ID
,SOMN.TRX_ORIG_CODE
,SOMN.ENRICHMENT_CODE
,SOMN.ENRICHMENT_PARTY_TYPE
,SOMN.HZ_CR_PARTY_ID
,SOMN.SAV_ID
,SOMN.SPLIT_PERCENT
,SOMN.PGTMV_PARTY_BE_ID
,SOMN.PGTMV_PARTY_GEO_ID
,SOMN.PGTMV_PARTY_COUNTRY_ID
,SOMN.START_DATE
,SOMN.STATUS_CODE
,SOMN.CREATION_DATE
,SOMN.USER_NAME
,SOMN.VALIDATION_DATE
,SOMN.LAST_UPDATE_DATE
,SOMN.BATCH_ID
,'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
,SOMN.PGTMV_PARTNER_CERT_LEVEL

 , PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE_SS_CODE AS PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE_SS_CODE 
 , PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE AS PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE 
 , PARTNER_OVERRIDE_REASON_CODE AS PARTNER_OVERRIDE_REASON_CODE FROM $$STGDB.ST_OTM_TRX_PARTIES_EXT_MNL_XAAS SOMN
WHERE SOMN.ENRICHMENT_CODE = 'PARTNER'
AND (NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM 
$$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER  NCPT 
WHERE  SOMN.PGTMV_PARTY_BE_ID = NCPT.BK_PGTMV_PARTNER_ID_INT))
AND  EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OTM_MANUAL_TRX_XAAS  OMTX,
$$ETLVWDB.SM_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITMSLSTRX_NRT SMXSS
WHERE   SOMN.ORDER_LINE_ID=OMTX.ORDER_LINE_ID
AND SOMN.TRX_ORIG_CODE=OMTX.TRX_ORIG_CODE
AND  OMTX.SOURCE_TRX_ID=SMXSS.SK_TRX_ID_INT)

SELECT
EOMN.TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID
,EOMN.ORDER_LINE_ID
,EOMN.TRX_ORIG_CODE
,EOMN.ENRICHMENT_CODE
,EOMN.ENRICHMENT_PARTY_TYPE
,EOMN.HZ_CR_PARTY_ID
,EOMN.SAV_ID
,EOMN.SPLIT_PERCENT
,EOMN.PGTMV_PARTY_BE_ID
,EOMN.PGTMV_PARTY_GEO_ID
,EOMN.PGTMV_PARTY_COUNTRY_ID
,EOMN.START_DATE
,EOMN.STATUS_CODE
,EOMN.CREATION_DATE
,EOMN.USER_NAME
,EOMN.VALIDATION_DATE
,EOMN.LAST_UPDATE_DATE
,EOMN.BATCH_ID
,EOMN.PGTMV_PARTNER_CERT_LEVEL

 , PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE_SS_CODE AS PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE_SS_CODE 
 , PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE AS PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE 
 , PARTNER_OVERRIDE_REASON_CODE AS PARTNER_OVERRIDE_REASON_CODE FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OTM_TRX_PARTIE_EXT_MNL_XAAS EOMN
WHERE EOMN.ENRICHMENT_CODE = 'PARTNER' AND NOT EXISTS
(  SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OTM_TRX_PARTIES_EXT_MNL_XAAS SOMN
WHERE SOMN.ORDER_LINE_ID=EOMN.ORDER_LINE_ID
AND SOMN.ENRICHMENT_CODE = 'PARTNER')
